A Message from the Heart of Mood Fixer

Life can feel really tough sometimes. You don't have to deal with it by yourself. Mood Fixer is here to help. We want to meet you where you're right now and help you feel better.

Whether you're starting a day, getting ready for bed, or just need something to brighten up a tough moment — we're here. One message at a time.

We use a mix of technology and human emotion to spark something in you. A small smile, a boost of energy, or a funny moment can make a real difference. This is more than a website. It's a place where you can feel safe and supported.

"We think that the right words, at the right time, can really change how you feel. And even change your life." — Created by Mood Fixer Project Team

Why Mood Fixer Matters

  • Instant Connection
    Tell us how you're feeling with emojis or honest words.
  • Pure Impact
    Short and sweet — a sentence or two that can make a big difference.
  • Brighter Perspective
    We want you to leave feeling better and happier every time.
  • Your Journey, Honored
    We care about your progress and celebrate every day you choose happiness.

⚠️ Mood Fixer is here to support your spirit with positivity and humor. This site is for motivational purposes only. We are not responsible for personal actions or medical emergencies. If you are in crisis, please seek professional help immediately. Your life is valuable.

"This is only the beginning! Mood Fixer is constantly growing with new datasets, more motivation, and fresh surprises. We are building a better experience every day."

Mood Fixer

Your daily companion for positivity, motivation, and smiles. We meet you where you are and help you feel a little better — one message at a time.

You are not alone.

Terms of Use

Effective Date: May 16, 2026

Welcome to Mood Fixer. By accessing or using our website, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Use. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, please do not use our website.

1. Purpose of the Website

Mood Fixer is an AI-driven, user-friendly platform designed to provide quick motivational quotes, facts, and jokes (delivered in 1 to 2 sentences) based on the user's selected emoji or description. The website is intended solely for entertainment, encouragement, and morale-boosting purposes.

2. Eligibility and User Information

To personalize your experience, Mood Fixer may ask for basic information, including but not limited to:

  • Identity: Gender identification (Female, Male, Transgender, or other options).
  • Status: Current daily status (Waking up time, sleep time, normal time).

By providing this data, you agree that the system can use it to tailor the AI responses to best fit your immediate environment and mood.

3. Medical and Crisis Disclaimer

  • Not Medical Advice: Mood Fixer is not a medical, psychological, or crisis intervention platform. The AI-generated responses are not substitutes for professional mental health counseling, therapy, or medical treatment.
  • No Liability for Personal Harm: The creator, P.R.K.I. Pallegama, and Mood Fixer shall not be held legally responsible or liable under any circumstances for any personal injury, self-harm, accidents, or life-threatening situations involving our users.
  • Emergency Situations: If you are experiencing a mental health crisis, severe depression, or thoughts of self-harm, you must immediately close this website and contact your local emergency services, medical professionals, or a crisis hotline.

4. AI Content and System Behavior

The website utilizes Artificial Intelligence (AI) to analyze your inputs (typed descriptions or clicked emojis) to generate a response. Because the content is AI-generated, Mood Fixer cannot guarantee that every result will perfectly align with your expectations. We strive to provide uplifting and safe content, but users interact with the AI at their own risk.

5. Data Tracking, Calendar, and Sign-In Retention

To encourage you to build a daily habit of positivity, the system includes a calendar and time-tracking feature. Mood Fixer saves your login/sign-in date and time so you can track your journey and return for consecutive days. By signing in, you consent to the storage of this minimal data on your browser/system to maintain your streak and history.

6. Continuous Evolution and Future Updates

Mood Fixer is a growing project. We explicitly reserve the right to update, modify, change, or temporarily take down parts of the website without prior notice. Future updates may include advanced AI features, layout changes, and new content categories to improve your experience.

7. User Conduct

You agree to use Mood Fixer responsibly. You may not use the description box to input malicious code, hate speech, or illegal text.

Back to Mood Fixer

Privacy Policy

Last updated: May 2024

Welcome to Mood Fixer. Your privacy is incredibly important to us. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information when you visit our site to find motivation, facts, and jokes.

1. Information We Collect

To provide you with the best "Mood Fix" possible, we collect the following information:

  • User Input: Any descriptions you type or emojis you click to express your mood.
  • Profile Details: Information regarding your gender (male, female, or transgender) to help personalize your experience.
  • Usage Data: We save the date and time you sign in to help you track your progress using our built-in calendar.

2. How We Use Your Information

We use the data we collect to:

  • Personalize Content: Our AI analyzes your mood and description to provide the most relevant one-to-two sentence motivation, fact, or joke.
  • Improve the System: Your interactions help us train our AI to be more accurate and helpful.
  • Future Development: We use general data to plan future updates and new features for the website.

3. AI and Data Processing

Our website uses Artificial Intelligence (AI) to understand your emotional state quickly. This process is automated to ensure you get an instant result that can change your day or week for the better.

4. Data Retention

We save your sign-in history and calendar data so that when you return for your "second-day visit," the system recognizes your journey. You have the right to know your history and how much time you have spent improving your morale with us.

5. Security and Liability

While we strive to protect your data, please remember:

  • Personal Safety: Mood Fixer is for motivational purposes. We are not responsible for any personal injury, accidents, or self-harm resulting from your personal actions.
  • Professional Help: If you are in a crisis, please seek professional medical assistance immediately.

6. Updates to This Policy

As Mood Fixer is not "finished" and will receive future updates, we may update this Privacy Policy to reflect new features. We encourage you to check this page regularly.

Back to Mood Fixer

Safety & Crisis Help

You Matter. Please Reach Out.

🆘 Immediate Help Needed?

If you are in immediate danger, please call your local emergency services right away.



At Mood Fixer, our main goal is to bring a smile to your face and motivation to your day. However, we know that some days are too heavy for a quick joke or a motivational quote to fix. If you are going through an overwhelming crisis, experiencing thoughts of self-harm, or feeling like you cannot go on, please know that you do not have to carry this pain alone.

While our AI tools are here to lift your spirits, Mood Fixer is not a crisis intervention service or a substitute for professional mental health care. Your safety is the most important thing to us. People care about you, and there is real support available right now.

Immediate Crisis Resources

If you are in immediate danger of hurting yourself or someone else, please use the resources below. These services are free, confidential, and available 24/7:

🚨 National Emergency Services

Call your local emergency number (such as 911, 112, 199, or 999 depending on your country) or visit the nearest hospital emergency room.

🌍 International Crisis Lines

If you are outside of Sri Lanka, please find free, immediate support available in your country via Find A Helpline or Befrienders Worldwide.

Find A Helpline Befrienders
"Every storm passes, even the ones that feel like they will never end. Taking care of your mental health is a sign of strength, not weakness. Please reach out to one of the resources above or talk to a trusted friend, family member, or doctor today. Your life has value, and tomorrow needs you."

— A Message from Mood Fixer

FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

Welcome to the Mood Fixer help center! Here you can find answers to how our platform works, who we serve, and how we aim to change your day for the better.

Mood Fixer is an interactive, AI-driven website designed to instantly shift your mindset. our mission is to deliver the exact words you need right when you need them—whether that is a fascinating fact, a powerful dose of motivation, or a well-timed joke. We do not believe in boring walls of text or dull colors. We deliver high-energy, impactful results in just one or two sentences.

Our platform is inclusive and open to absolutely everyone. We cater to all individuals across the globe, including:

  • Females
  • Males
  • Transgender individuals

No matter who you are, your emotional well-being matters to us.

We make it incredibly easy for you to share your feelings. When you visit the site, you can either click an emoji that represents how you feel right now or type a quick description of what is on your mind.

Our built-in AI analyzes your input to instantly detect your current state—whether you are sad, happy, just waking up, getting ready for sleep, or simply having a normal day. It then handpicks the perfect response to match your energy.

We believe that a single phrase can change a person's life, day, week, or even year. Long paragraphs can be boring and tiresome to read. By keeping our results to a maximum of two sentences, we ensure that the message is powerful, memorable, and gives you an instant boost of morale before you leave our site.

Mood Fixer features an active calendar and clock system. We save your sign-in date and time so you can track your journey with us. This system is also designed to encourage you to return for your second day, helping you build a daily habit of checking in on your happiness.

No. While Mood Fixer is designed to bring joy, motivation, and a positive morale boost, it is purely for motivational and entertainment purposes. Mood Fixer and its creator, P.R.K.I. Pallegama, do not provide professional medical or crisis counseling, and are not legally responsible for personal actions or emergencies. If you are going through a severe crisis, please reach out to a professional healthcare provider immediately.

Not at all! This is just the beginning. We are highly committed to the future of Mood Fixer. We hope to launch exciting future updates soon, including advanced AI features, more content categories, and new interactive tools to make your experience even better.

Still have questions?

We are always here to help you fix your mood. Thank you for choosing Mood Fixer!

Contact Support
